programme.desc: A small bird wants to befriend Mr. Bean, but its squawking sound annoys Mrs. Wicket.

programme.title: Green Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's electricity is cut off so he decides to build a wind turbine.

programme.title: Rat Trap
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to deal with an unwanted house guest but the stubborn rat refuses to leave.

programme.title: Charity Bean
programme.desc: Bean is both cajoled by Irma and spurred by his own jealousy of the fund-raising super-star Declan.

programme.title: Jumping Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to learn skateboarding but hurts himself on his first try.

programme.title: Car Wars
programme.desc: The mystery driver of the Reliant Supervan becomes obsessed with revenge.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When there's no milk for his tea and for Teddy, Mr. Bean goes to buy some.

programme.title: Pizza Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean orders a takeaway pizza, but when it arrives, he feels let down by the size of it.

programme.title: Dig This
programme.desc: It is a nice sunny day and Mr. Bean and Mrs. Wicket are relaxing in the garden.

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Mr. Bean prepares to give the children some tricks and treats they won't forget.

programme.title: Birthday Bear
programme.desc: Mr Bean forgets his teddy's Birthday - then gives him a treat to remember.

programme.title: No Parking
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't find a parking space. So he makes one of his own.

programme.title: In the Pink
programme.desc: Mr Bean, badgered by a strange pink animal, warms to the creature when it shows its true colours.

programme.title: Dinner For Two
programme.desc: When invited to dinner by Mr Bean, it's probably best to take your own sandwiches.

programme.title: Birthday Party
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is feeling down when everyone forgot his birthday.

programme.title: Homeless
programme.desc: Mr Bean needs to let a room but no one will let him.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Mr Bean meets a soul mate.

programme.title: Artful Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean gets a real bug for painting. Then several bugs… and flies and slugs and mice.

programme.title: Young Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean takes a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes obsessed with gaming after being introduced by Mrs. Wicket's nephew.

programme.title: Inventor
programme.desc: A brand new lodger in the house could be a great new friend, or could be your worst enemy.

programme.title: Bean in Love
programme.desc: Mr Bean becomes smitten with a beautiful singer.

programme.title: Scout Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes a Scoutmaster for the day.

programme.title: Rare Bird
programme.desc: Mr. Bean loves bird spotting and is desperate to tick off the last elusive bird in his book.

programme.title: The Fly
programme.desc: Bean fights a loosing battle with a winged beast from Hell.

programme.title: Haircut
programme.desc: Mr Bean has a bad hair day.

programme.title: Magpie
programme.desc: Mr Bean gets in a complete flap when he befriends a feathered thief.

programme.title: Home Movie
programme.desc: Mr. Bean attempts to make his own home movie – a horror thriller with Mrs. Wicket as the star!

programme.title: Air Bud
programme.desc: A lonely boy's life is transformed when he befriends a “wonder” dog who teaches him to play basketball.

programme.title: Lassie: A New Adventure
programme.desc: The most famous dog in cinema history returns in a thrilling new family adventure!

programme.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
programme.desc: Buddy is taking his show to the beaches and getting into a whole new sport: beach volleyball! Life on the beach isn't as relaxing as it sounds. A rash of mysterious crimes has been plaguing the town and paw prints at the scene seem to point all fingers at Buddy!

programme.title: Asterix: The Secret of the Magic Potion
programme.desc: After elderly druid Getafix falls out of a tree, he resolves to find a young successor to whom he can entrust the secret formula for the magic potion that makes his village the only one in Gaul still unconquered by the Romans.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: Barbie's youngest sister Chelsea is entered into a local bike race by her friend, she is embarrassed about not being able to ride without training wheels. Inspired by Barbie's stories, Chelsea finds herself transported to the magical world of Dreamtopia, where her imagination runs wild.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Brendan Gleeson is Murray, a once proud fisherman who now, along with his former colleagues in the harbour of Tickle Head are out of work and forced to live off welfare.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A man who dumps his long-time girlfriend discovers his ex is a superhero, and she's out for revenge.

programme.title: The Ultimate Gift
programme.desc: Jason thought his inheritance was going to be the gift of money and lots of it. Was he ever in for a big surprise.

programme.title: How About You
programme.desc: A star studded festive comedy. Ellie (Hayley Atwell) is left in charge of an elderly residential home over Christmas, and while most of the residents have left to spend time with their families, four grumpy residents remain.

programme.title: Deadliest Switch
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller starring Lindsay Hartley. Two families are thrown into crisis when they discover their daughters were switched at birth - but nothing will stop one mother keeping what's hers...

programme.title: Reflections
programme.desc: (2008) Espionage thriller starring Timothy Hutton. A Europol agent and criminal profiler is summoned to Barcelona to track down an infamous serial killer, nicknamed Pygmalion.

programme.title: The Warrant
programme.desc: (2020) Western with Neal McDonough and Casper Van Dien. Brothers in war. Enemies in peace. When two former Civil War comrades find themselves on opposite sides of the law, will a new battle ignite?

programme.title: Nanny's Killer Scandal
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller with Mia Topalian. Unable to find a management job, Jamie becomes a nanny for a charismatic tycoon. But rejecting his advances will put her - like those before her - in mortal danger..

programme.title: CONTRACT TO KILL
programme.desc: A CIA agent has to stop Islamic terrorists from teaming up with Mexican cartels to smuggle weapons of mass destruction into the U.S.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Academy Award® winner Russell Crowe stars as Noah, a man chosen by God for a great task before an apocalyptic flood destroys the world.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Full of shock turns, moments of horrific injury, polar bear action and tense emotional scenes, Arctic will keep your hands clenched to your chair until its brilliant, breathless conclusion.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: Into The Blue 2: The Reef
programme.desc: Free-spirited scuba divers Sebastion and Dani run a modest diving company in Hawaii. The young couple is delighted when they're hired by mysterious jet-setters who are searching for sunken treasure and will pay big money for diving help.

programme.title: Gemini
programme.desc: A heinous crime tests the complex relationship between a tenacious personal assistant and her Hollywood starlet boss. As the assistant travels across Los Angeles to unravel the mystery, she must stay one step ahead of a determined policeman...

programme.title: Princess Caraboo
programme.desc: A mysterious young woman speaking a strange language shows up in an English village, where she is taken in by aristocrats who assume she is a foreign princess

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: Josh and Cornelia are a happily married middle aged couple, who seem content with where their life is going. One day whilst teaching, Josh meets Jamie and Darby, a free-spirited young couple, who are spontaneous and untethered. Before long, Josh and Cornelia throw aside their age to trail after the young hipsters and feel the zest for life they once had.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: A crew of miniature aliens operate a spaceship that has a human form

programme.title: The Man Without A Face
programme.desc: Chuck wants to leave home but can't make the grade for boarding school. Then, he finds out the disfigured recluse (Mel Gibson, "Braveheart") living nearby is an ex-teacher.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In America
programme.desc: Sergio Leone's final film is the epic tale of the life of a Jewish gangster in New York.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: Chronicles the courage and power of the people of Boston during the manhunt for the Boston Marathon bombers.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Two hardened criminals get into trouble with the US border patrol after meeting with a Mexican drug lord.

programme.title: The Fighter
programme.desc: A fledgling boxer tries to escape the shadow of his more famous but troubled older boxing brother.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival. The only problem is, in the sixteen Earth years since the first humans landed on Rhea, two hundred and eighty-eight years have passed on the new planet and the existing population are no longer welcoming new arrivals, with the Rheans having set up a space blockade to shot down any ship that tries to cross into their territory. 'Earther', Bran, has big dreams of a better life in this new world, but the odds are stacked against him. Finding himself the lone survivor of a failed emigration attempt, his escape pod floats mindlessly in space and his oxygen is running low. His only chance of survival is to hook up to a rogue Rhean supply ship called The Nysa running on auxiliary power. But after finding the crew on board The Nysa dead, it seems Bran may have more than just a hostile planet to worry about. An intense interstellar thriller with an impressive cast, including Stephen Moyer (True Blood), Casper Van Dien (Starship Troopers) and John Rhys-Davies (the Indiana Jones and Lord of the Rings franchises).

programme.title: Deadly Target
programme.desc: When Special Operative James Webster (Michael Jai White, The Dark Knight, Blood and Bone) returns home from duty to find his brother brutally murdered, his lethal training immediately kicks in. Fuelled by rage and a burning need to avenge his brother, he sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and nothing is going to stand in his way... As he delves deeper to identify the murderers, he finds himself at the centre of a deadly conspiracy and a secret world of corruption one which cuts deep inside the U.S. Government, reaching the very highest levels of command. With a ruthless military assassin (Steve Austin, The Expendables) hot on his trail, Webster must expose the corrupt high-ranking officials before he becomes another victim to the very plot which killed his brother.

programme.title: Assassin
programme.desc: Danny Dyer (Eastenders) is back on top form in Assassin, a brutal, hard-hitting story of Jamie, a former hitman out for revenge. Starring Martin Kemp (The Krays), Gary Kemp (The World's End), and from the producers of Rise of the Footsoldier and Goodfellas, Assassin is the story of the most corrupt crime bosses in the London underworld, and one man's crusade to bring them to justice.

programme.title: First Kill
programme.desc: No time off when it comes to crime! Starring Bruce Willis (Looper) and Gethin Anthony (Game of Thrones) this nail-biting, explosive thriller sees a holiday gone horribly wrong! In an attempt to reconnect with his son, Will (Haydn Christensen Jumper) takes his family to the cabin where he grew up. However, their trip takes a deadly turn when they witness the murder of a crooked police officer.

programme.title: Rise of the Viking
programme.desc: From the director of epic fantasy, Black Sails and starring Breaking Bad's Jonathan Banks comes this historical actioner perfect for all Game of Thrones fans. 754 AD- during a time of epic battles and bloodshed, the legend of the pagan warrior king Redbad is born, but so is a new weapon against his people: Christianity. Redbad must unite a Viking army to defeat the seemingly invincible Franks.

programme.title: The Beach House
programme.desc: (2018) Romance starring Andie MacDowell. After being fired, Cara heads home to fix the family beach house. Whilst there she is forced to face the past head-on. Also starring Chad Michael Murray.

programme.title: The Irresistible Blueberry Farm
programme.desc: (2016) Romance starring Alison Sweeney. Ellen sets off on a journey to fulfil her grandmother's dying wish, but will she find true love on the way?

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: (2021) Rom-com starring Brooke Nevin. An ambitious New York events planner butts heads with her client: a stubborn but influential website editor. Have they met their match in one another?

programme.title: The Longest Week
programme.desc: A man is left broke and homeless, so an old friend offers him somewhere to stay- only for him to fall in love with his girlfriend. Starring Jason Bateman and Olivia Wilde (2014)

programme.title: One Of A Kind Love
programme.desc: (2020) Rom-com with Jocelyn Hudon and Jake Manley. Aspiring jeweller Kyra dreams big, but will a clash with business tycoon Aidan tarnish her sparkle-or ignite something magical?

programme.title: Aristotle and Dante
programme.desc: Mexican teenagers Aristotle Mendoza and Dante Quintana explore their friendship while struggling with racial and ethnic identity, sexuality and family relationships in 1987 El Paso, Texas. Based on the book by Benjamin Alire Sáenz

programme.title: Vita & Virginia
programme.desc: It's the fascinating true story about the love affair between socialite and popular author Vita Sackville-West and literary icon Virginia Woolf, and the love story that inspired Virginia Woolf's Orlando. Starring Gemma Arterton, Elizabeth Debicki and Isabella Rossellini.

programme.title: 23 Walks
programme.desc: Dave and Fern, two older strangers, have been bruised by their individual circumstance. They meet walking their dogs in a North London park, and over the course of twenty-three walks together romance begins to blossom.

programme.title: Elvis And Anabelle
programme.desc: After a miracle, a beauty queen and a small town boy are thrown together in this life affirming story of young love.

programme.title: Dognapped: Hound for the Holidays
programme.desc: An assistant of an influencer and a charming vet bond to find a missy puppy before Christmas.

programme.title: Fixing Up Christmas
programme.desc: Known as a “fixer” for difficult clients, a talented party planner must help a young CEO plan the Christmas party of the year to dazzle the mayor and save his company. Wil the "fixer" fix something more than just the company?

programme.title: The Christmas Gift
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story. Ten-year-old Wesley puts together a "Secret Santa" gift for a needy child and when ten-year-old Megan opens the package, she discovers an item that will have a huge impact on her life to come.

programme.title: A Good Woman
programme.desc: The seductive Mrs. Erlynne (Helen Hunt) travels to Amalfi, Italy, hoping to win over married aristocrat Robert Windermere. But when Windermere's innocent wife Meg (Scarlett Johansson) hears of the scandal, she plots an elaborate revenge.

programme.title: A Royal Surprise
programme.desc: When Riley's boyfriend, Mandla, invites her to South Africa to meet his family, she is shocked to discover that he is a prince. The news puts Riley's trust in Mandla in jeopardy, and he must do what he can to win her love back.

programme.title: Finding Grace
programme.desc: A troubled teenage girl is forced to provide community service in a retirement home. As she develops a friendship with one of the residents and becomes closer to her father, she discovers the power of family, hope and faith.

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: American doctor Ivy Miller lives in Bali, working at a charitable health clinic. When a billionaire benefactor named Dylan Donnelly arrives, Ivy is less than impressed. He is only interested in making himself look better by appearing charitable. Ivy is happy when he goes on his way, but then an accident injures one of Dylan's trusted advisors, Blake. Dylan insists Ivy stay at Dylan's lavish estate in Bali to care for Blake until he's well.

programme.title: Blueprint To The Heart
programme.desc: An interior designer trying to save her home renovation show needs to apply her successful, upscale "fixer upper" home renovation strategy to her blue collar carpenter by making the sweet but disheveled guy her next fixer upper project.

programme.title: Love Surreal
programme.desc: Abby is a promising art student whose long-term relationship with her perfect—but imaginary—boyfriend Sy is going strong, until fellow student Quinn enters the picture. Trapped into tutoring Quinn, Abby begins to fall for this flawed but flesh-and-blood reality. Now Abby must decide if she's ready for a real chance at love—and if she can let go of Sy.

programme.title: Robin Cook's Terminal
programme.desc: Hospital touts brain cancer cure doctor probes girl's death.

programme.title: Robin Cook's Mortal Fear
programme.desc: Novel-based: mad killer spreads aging virus race to halt in hospitals.

programme.title: The Great Los Angeles Earthquake: Day 1
programme.desc: When predictions of an earthquake in L.A. are leaked to the media, panic ensues.

programme.title: Betrayed by a Lover
programme.desc: Christine Carter's 7-year perfect marriage ended with Nicholas Francisco's exit.

programme.title: Robin Cook's Terminal
programme.desc: Hospital touts brain cancer cure doctor probes girl's death.

programme.title: Running Away
programme.desc: Sisters Maggie and Lizzie move in with mom Peg's new husband. Secrets and lies start immediately. Maggie cannot handle what follows and recruits a friend to help her plan to get out of town with her step father's secrets. When Peg discovers that her daughter has run away, she now has to find Maggie fast but must come to terms with the dark secrets that led to Maggie's fleeing and the secrets about her new husband.

programme.title: Mediator
programme.desc: A family counselor in the missing children's division becomes a mediator between the living and the missing.

programme.title: Killer Caregiver
programme.desc: After a woman is wounded in an accident, a young and attractive live-in caregiver moves into her home where strange and dangerous events unfold until the woman discovers her caregiver is hell-bent on destroying her life.

programme.title: The Psycho She Met Online
programme.desc: While her husband heals from a car crash, Karen bonds with their new renter—until another houseguest vanishes.

programme.title: Another Man's Wife
programme.desc: After a tragic car accident, a family gets away to a remote mountain cabin to recover and rebuild their lives. During their vacation, a handsome man befriends them only to get revenge and destroy what is left of their fragile lives.

programme.title: Punchline
programme.desc: Stand-up comedy hopefuls toil in obscurity at a New York club while waiting for their big break.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: The Academy Award-winning (best actor Jack Nicholson, best actress Helen Hunt) offbeat comedy celebrates the unique bond between three very different characters. Also stars Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Two disgraced FBI agents go way undercover in an effort to protect hotel heiresses the Wilton Sisters from a kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Five Guns West
programme.desc: Shalee Jethro (Dorothy Malone) helps her father run a desert stagecoach station.

programme.title: The General
programme.desc: When Union spies steal an engineer's beloved locomotive, he pursues it single-handedly and straight through enemy lines.

programme.title: The Cariboo Trail
programme.desc: Montanans Jim Redfern and Mike Evans head into Canada's British Columbia via the Cariboo Trail intent to raise cattle and dig for gold but find trouble instead.

programme.title: The Hired Hand
programme.desc: Harry returns home to his wife and farm after drifting with his friend Arch and has to make a difficult decision regarding his loyalties.

programme.title: Gunsight Ridge
programme.desc: Stage line agent investigates a series of robberies by taking the job of a deputy sheriff in a border Arizona town.

programme.title: Laughter in Paradise
programme.desc: When the last will and testament of wealthy, notorious practical joker Henry Augustus Russell is read to his only surviving relatives, it is found that he had remained faithful to his reputation until his last hours. Each of his four relatives will receive a fortune, provided they perform required hilarious, embarrassing or criminal acts.

programme.title: Make Mine Mink
programme.desc: A group of people lead by Major Rayne (Terry Thomas), hatch a plan to steal fur coats, sell them and give the money to charity. As a group, however, they are not particularly experienced in such matters.

programme.title: Don't Bother to Knock
programme.desc: Having too many girlfriends for his own comfort and safety, a lively young travel agent's troubles begin when he mislays the key to his flat and a friend presents him with several more with his name and address attached. Sentimentally, he gives one to each of the glamorous girls he meets on a continental holiday - all of whom turn up at his flat just as he is planning to marry someone else!

programme.title: Where There's a Will
programme.desc: Benjamin Stubbins is a penniless lawyer who has spent most of his money on drink. When he accidentally interrupts a robbery at work, he becomes the target of a gang of thieves who determine that although he is impoverished, his relatives aren't.

programme.title: Happiest Days of Your Life
programme.desc: Confusion at The Ministry results in a girls school being joined with a boys school, in this rip roaring, laugh a minute, classic English farce.

programme.title: How to steal a dog
programme.desc: Ji-so, a young girl who doesn't have a house because of her bankrupted dad. In order to get money to buy a house she plan to steals wealthy people's dogs to earn reward money when she returns them.

programme.title: 200 Pounds Beauty
programme.desc: A talented but obese girl, who ghost-sings for a not-so-talented pop star, undergoes extensive plastic surgery to become a slender beauty with a new identity.

programme.title: Cart
programme.desc: Temporary women workers as docile as a lamb lock arms together against mighty money.

programme.title: Unframed
programme.desc: An omnibus film project, written and directed by four actors exploring new possibilities outside the frame, capturing moments of life, family and relationships.

programme.title: Little Brother
programme.desc: A warming and touching drama about a 9-year-old troublemaker who suddenly starts behaving himself believing that being good can save his ill brother.

programme.title: Invasion Planet Earth
programme.desc: When a gigantic, all-consuming alien mothership appears in the sky and launches a ruthless attack, the ultimate war for Planet Earth is about to begin...

programme.title: Strawberry Mansion
programme.desc: In the near future an unassuming dream tax auditor gets swept up in a cosmic journey through the life and dreams of an ageing eccentric.

programme.title: The White King
programme.desc: Djata is a care-free 12-year-old growing up in a brutal dictatorship shut off from the outside world. When the government imprisons his father, Peter, and Djata and his mother Hannah are labeled traitors, the boy will not rest until he sees his father again.

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: PREDESTINATION chronicles the life of a Temporal Agent (Ethan Hawke) sent on an intricate series of time-travel journeys designed to stop crimes before they are committed.

programme.title: Implanted
programme.desc: Sarah, a struggling young woman living in Brooklyn, agrees to volunteer as an experimental test subject for a company to be implanted with a nanochip in her cerebral cortex. When the implant turns sinister and orders her to commit crimes, Sarah has only one choice: to live or die.

programme.title: An Aurora Teagarden Mystery
programme.desc: (2017) Crime mystery with Candace Cameron Bure and Lexa Doig. A body on her porch. A baby in her bath. A stranger in her closet. Even for super sleuth Aurora, it's a lot to unravel...

programme.title: An Aurora Teagarden Mystery
programme.desc: (2018) Crime mystery with Candace Cameron Bure and Lexa Doig. Crime buff Aurora discovers she's the inspiration for a new film. But the plot thickens when the actress playing her is killed...

programme.title: The Gourmet Detective
programme.desc: (2015) Crime mystery with Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns. Murder is on the menu as a culinary expert and a no-nonsense detective team up to investigate a shocking crime at a five-star restaurant.

programme.title: Blowback
programme.desc: (2022) Tense thriller with Randy Couture. After he's sabotaged by those closest to him during a bullet-ridden heist, a brilliant thief manages to survive - and vows to kill everyone who betrayed him.

programme.title: Nocebo
programme.desc: (2022) Unsettling psychological thriller starring Eva Green. A fashion designer suffers from a puzzling illness that confounds her doctors - until a mysterious caregiver reveals a horrifying truth...

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Anacondas: The Hunt For The Blood Orchid
programme.desc: When a corporate pharmaceutical sponsor is about to pull the plug on research, part-time adventurer Dr. Jack Byron re-awakens their interest with tales of the Borneo black orchid, said to produce a chemical that can keep a cell reproducing indefinitely. When the trip becomes increasingly dangerous, due to floods, capsized boats and gigantic, ill-tempered anacondas, Byron refuses to allow his crew to end the expedition, and resorts to foul play in order to keep them on the trail.

programme.title: District 9
programme.desc: From producer Peter Jackson and director Neill Blomkamp comes a startlingly original science-fiction thriller where alien refugees, stranded on Earth, are exiled to a slum on the fringes of Johannesburg.

programme.title: Eight Millimeter
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Nicolas Cage (LEAVING LAS VEGAS) stars as a private eye hired to investigate the truth behind a film reel which seems to portray an actual murder. His investigation leads him into the seedy underbelly of society, which threatens to consume and destroy him.

programme.title: The Healer
programme.desc: As much as Alec yearns to avoid being attributed any healing powers, more bizarre events keep occurring. Alec, in shock, is discovering the family secret he possesses, a gift… the gift of healing, a gift he must accept or reject.

programme.title: Percy vs Goliath
programme.desc: Small-town farmer Percy (Christopher Walken) takes on a giant corporation after they contaminate his crops in a desperate war against corporate greed.

programme.title: Luxor
programme.desc: When British aid worker Hana returns to the ancient city of Luxor, she comes across Sultan, a talented archeologist and former lover. As she wanders, haunted by the familiar place, she struggles to reconcile the choices of the past with the uncertainty of the present.

programme.title: Jobs
programme.desc: Ashton Kutcher is Steve Jobs, the iconic Apple innovator and groundbreaking entrepreneur. This inspiring and entertaining film chronicles Jobs early days as a college dropout, to his rise as the co-founder of Apple Computer Inc.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Two immortally linked souls transcend the boundaries of time and space, one desperately searching for the answers that will save the other, and deliver the promise of eternal life.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

Based on actual events - A group of 5 people find themselves trapped in an elevator in the World Trade Center's North Tower on 9/11. They work together, never giving up hope, to try to escape before the unthinkable happens.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.
